flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at United Tribes Technical College rose 125% between 2014 and 2017 (33.3% → 75.0%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at United Tribes Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (32.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at United Tribes Technical College rose 27% between 2021 and 2024 (448 → 569).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at United Tribes Technical College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (17.5% → 21.3%).
